q: How do I get VPN access set up?
a: VPN accounts are created by IT Operations 2 days before your start date via Cisco AnyConnect. Full access activates on Day 1 once MFA (YubiKey + authenticator app) is configured.

q: When do I get write access to code repositories?
a: Read access to code repositories is granted Day 2. Write access is granted Day 5, after you've completed mandatory security training.
Minimum 14 characters with uppercase, lowercase, numeric, and special characters. Privileged accounts rotate every 90 days; standard accounts every 180 days. You can't reuse your last 12 passwords.

q: How is sensitive data classified at TechVenture?
a: Four tiers: Public, Internal Use Only, Confidential, and Restricted. Personal data under PDPA (IC numbers, biometric data) is Restricted by default. When unsure, classify one level higher and request review.

q: When does benefits enrollment need to happen?
a: Benefits enrollment briefing happens on Day 1; enrollment itself must be completed by Day 14.

q: What's the meal allowance if I travel to Singapore?
a: SGD 20 breakfast, SGD 30 lunch, SGD 50 dinner — SGD 100/day total. Meals provided by a hotel, client, or event are deducted from the per diem.

q: How long do I have to submit an expense claim?
a: Within 14 calendar days of trip completion. Claims after 30 days need Finance Manager approval; after 60 days they're rejected with no exceptions.

q: What should I expect on Day 1?
a: Morning: welcome/orientation, IT equipment handover, account activation, company overview, benefits briefing, and meeting your buddy. Afternoon: team intro, Security Awareness Module 1, tool walkthrough, and a 1:1 with your manager on 30-day goals.
